summary: Add /api/meta-kb dashboard endpoint — returns index age, record counts, category/risk breakdown, anti-pattern/convention/command counts, and inline drift status
root_cause: No visibility into meta-KB health from the dashboard
fix_approach: Created GET route following health/route.ts pattern; reads meta-knowledge-index.json, computes staleness, runs inline drift check via execSync; 4 tests

validation.notes: Route is read-only, fail-open on drift check
